name: Beechwood Golf Club
about: Beechwood Golf Club is a family-owned and operated establishment featuring a challenging 18-hole outdoor course and an indoor golf simulator facility. The venue provides year-round golf access through three indoor simulators alongside a bar and grill, catering to both traditional golfers and those seeking indoor practice. Located off I-90 at Exit 18 and Sterrettania Road in Erie, PA, the club offers a mix of outdoor and indoor golfing options, along with event planning and dining services. It serves as a versatile destination for golfers looking for practice, play, or social gatherings in a friendly environment.
why_golfers_like_it: Year-round access to three indoor golf simulators
Family-friendly environment with on-site dining options
Challenging 18-hole outdoor course for traditional play
Convenient location near I-90 for easy access
Membership benefits including discounted simulator hours

food_and_drink.notes: Bar and grill with kitchen open Tuesday-Saturday (11:00 AM - 8:00 PM). New menu available.
On-site bar available during operating hours

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, you'll need to bring your own clubs for both outdoor and indoor simulator play.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drink?
faq.answer: Outside food and drink are not mentioned, but the venue has its own bar and grill with kitchen service.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: For outdoor play, 18 holes would typically take 4-5 hours depending on pace. Indoor simulator time varies by booking.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Beechwood Golf Club is family-owned and operated, welcoming families and offering a family-friendly environment.
